feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Blood, Sweat and Tears
entry.summary:
Author: itsmepaper

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,678Chapters: 6/15Kudos: 49

Summary: Merlin disappears in the middle of the night, leaving behind nothing but a scream heard by a nearby servant, a smear of blood, and a castle full of unanswered questions. Arthur is convinced it’s just Merlin being Merlin, until the hours stretch on, the clues grow stranger, and the fear in Camelot becomes impossible to ignore. Arthur goes off on a journey to find the missing Merlin, to bring him home, back to Camelot. But that’s harder than Arthur could have ever imagined.

entry.title: Ser Merlin of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Kat_Jay_Sparrow

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,724Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 5

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, the fate of the world rests on the shoulders of one man, his name… Merlin. Or so the tales go. But tales have a way of getting away from oneself, and history has a way of morphing. For while the fate of the world would always rest on Merlin’s shoulders, how he determined that fate had a way of changing, of spinning out, from one tale to another, from one moment to the next, in a web of different destinies. For this tale has been told before, and shall be again, in a web of magic and time, in choice and fate, in friendship and family, and in love and duty. With the simple act of a single man leaving something as small and insignificant as a mere cloak behind, so our tale begins. When Merlin uses his father's crest to get Lancelot into the knights it's sets off a series of events that change the future of Camelot and Albion forever. Can Merlin make it through his time as Arthur's squire alive? Can he protect his new found family while hiding his growing feelings for his prince? Can Arthur hide his for his manservant turned squire? Only time will tell.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Anchor
entry.summary:
Author: jesstheemess

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,983Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Merlin has spent hundreds of years, being lost at sea in his mind, and with his magic. He’s forgotten most of what he used to know, including Arthur’s face. He’d given up on hope that he’d ever return. But one night, after returning to his estate, having spent years away from the lake, a knock came at his door. His Once and Future King, risen again. But first, he must teach Arthur the modern world and uncover the true reason he’s been brought back from the dead. Not to save the world, but to save Merlin.

entry.title: Earth & Magic
entry.summary:
Author: that_local

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,834Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 0

Summary: "So, not only are you the best fighter I've ever met. You are also beautiful and educated." Gwaine clicked his tongue, "You must know your worth is a hundred times your weight in gold." ••• "I'm afraid to think what might've happened if you hadn't saved us." Merlin says. The figure laughs, removing their hood,"You do seem to be afraid of most things, Merlin." Both the men smiled."Natalia," Merlin thanked the gods that she was safe. ••• "Redmond thinks that I'm going to marry an adventurer during my travels." Natalia was proud of herself for making Merlin so flustered that he pinched the bridge of his nose in disbelief."Well," Gwaine spoke smugly and played into the joke, "I hope that we meet during your travels, and I can become that adventurer."

entry.title: Would You Stand At My Side
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,139Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 99

Summary: Honestly, Merlin had thought telling Arthur about his magic, and revoking the old laws would be the biggest obstacles to creating Albion. Really that had all been the easy part. After a few teary, but heartfelt conversations Merlin was installed as the new Court Sorcerer and together they set out to unite all the lands in peace. Apparently the biggest setback was proving to be their marriage status or lack-there-of. Who knew so many people cared about whether a king or wizard had a spouse? Well, Arthur has an idea to solve both of their problems, if it doesn’t prove to break Merlin’s heart first. Because how was he supposed to let go after getting a taste of the one thing he’d aways wanted, Arthur’s hand in marriage. Or my fake-marriage Valentine’s Day special no one asked me for!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: True of Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SprinkleHatesEverything

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,541Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 9

Summary: "Since that day, magic began to occupy his thoughts more and more. Magic lived on in such a mundane way that Lancelot had a difficult time imagining who exactly it was that Uther had been fighting. Magic was everywhere, magic was in the heart of Camelot itself. Uther was definitely turning in his grave." OR Lancelot Du Lac is a selfless and honourable man with a strong sense of morality. He became a knight to defend and help the people around him. But when he starts to realise that he is complicit to a great injustice, as a feeling of helplessness starts to grip his heart as he watches his magical friend sacrifice himself from the shadows, he realises something needs to change

entry.summary:

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,923,850Chapters: 124/?Kudos: 1,616

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: Fated Prize
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,135Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: From the moment the prophecies named him Emrys, Arthur Pendragon has hunted the warlock destined to stand at his side. Not as an equal. As a prize. A dark, obsessive Merlin/Arthur tale of fate, conquest, public degradation, sexual depravity, and a king who traded his crown for the taste of his consort.

entry.summary:
Author: RomaMarufixx

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,659Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin is a patient in a mental health hospital and Arthur is her doctor. Merlin has feelings for Arthur and Arthur has feelings for Merlin, but the two of them shouldn't be together, with their doctor patient relationship as well as their age gap but after fixing some misunderstandings, is there a way for them to be together? Old work originally posted on FF.net in 2013.

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,771Chapters: 57/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 328,346Chapters: 70/110Kudos: 3,228

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,916Chapters: 3/9Kudos: 19

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?
